Positions indicated on serial numbers 6, 8, 9, 10,18,19, and 22: For administrative reasons, Bhavse (cadre)
Under Rule 4 (2) of the Rules, 1966, the original rank of sub-divisional officer was suspended and transferred to the proposed post.
Format is in the form of a cadre attached / attached to the base.
The posts indicated on serial numbers 12 and 17 are:
For administrative reasons, appointment under Section 12 (4) of the Bhavse (Pay) Rules, 2016
An ex-cadre post is one that belongs to the original category of officers who have been appointed.
The equivalent is in the form of a declaration.
2. Additional charge of the following vacancies until further orders of the Government.
The officers shown in front of the post should be accepted.
Additional charge of the remaining vacant posts is given to the Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Forest Force).
